---
title: "Tasks"
include-in-header:
  - text: '<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7/dist/d3.min.js"></script>'
---

This section provides a overview of the tasks evaluated in the paper.

- [`point-to-disk`](#point-to-disk)
- [`RF-DMC`](#rf-dmc)
- [`clutter-nav`](#clutter-nav)


{{< include point-to-disk.qmd >}}

{{< include rf-dmc.qmd >}}

{{< include clutter-nav.qmd >}}
